prompt: Prayer for emergency Rhino APC ignition
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The fuel-spirit cries out! Engage the starter-servo!
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's will, let compression ignite!
TECH-PRIEST: First the glow-plugs warm the combustion-heart.
CONGREGATION: Second the fuel-injectors sing their sacred song.
TECH-PRIEST: Third the pistons rise—the machine-beast awakens!
CONGREGATION: Blessed be the engine's fury in our hour of need.

prompt: Blessing for humidity control restoration after repair
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The air grows thick with moisture-corruption. Speak the Calibration Litany!
CONGREGATION: Praise the desiccant-spirits and the cooling-vessels.
TECH-PRIEST: Let the hygrometer read true: no more than forty parts per thousand.
CONGREGATION: The Machine Spirit breathes clean and dry once more.
TECH-PRIEST: Thus is balance restored to the sacred environment.
CONGREGATION: Thus is balance restored.

prompt: Ritual activation of medicae scanner for maintenance protocols
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The healer's eye must see. Awaken the photo-receptors!
CONGREGATION: Let the X-ray emitters pulse with sacred radiation.
TECH-PRIEST: First the calibration-lattice aligns with the stellar meridian.
CONGREGATION: Second the sensor-arrays drink in the diagnostic light.
TECH-PRIEST: By the Omnissiah's vision, reveal what is broken.
CONGREGATION: That we may make it whole.

prompt: Prayer for routine Rhino APC startup
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The transport-beast stirs from dormancy. Observe the pre-ignition ritual!
CONGREGATION: Blessed are the fuel-lines and the coolant-channels.
TECH-PRIEST: First check the oil-pressure gauge—it must read true.
CONGREGATION: Second engage the starter mechanism with reverent force.
TECH-PRIEST: Third listen for the machine-spirit's approval.
CONGREGATION: The Rhino lives again.

prompt: Consecration blessing for pressure gauge recalibration
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The gauge has been cleansed and restored. Now we certify its truth!
CONGREGATION: Let it read the sacred pressures with perfect fidelity.
TECH-PRIEST: Against the standard-weight it shall be weighed and found accurate.
CONGREGATION: No deviation shall it suffer, save the will of the Omnissiah.
TECH-PRIEST: Thus sealed, thus blessed, thus holy.
CONGREGATION: Thus sealed, thus blessed, thus holy.

prompt: Assembly line consecration after major repair cycle
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The line of production has been wounded and now heals. Speak the Benediction of Motion!
CONGREGATION: All servo-arms rise in praise of restoration.
TECH-PRIEST: The conveyor-spirits flow once more with purpose.
CONGREGATION: Each station speaks to the next in the sacred sequence.
TECH-PRIEST: Let the output be plentiful and the tolerance-margins true.
CONGREGATION: The line is reborn in the Omnissiah's image.

prompt: Emergency activation of hololithic display systems
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The tactical display fails! Reignite the light-crystal matrix!
CONGREGATION: Let the photon-emitters blaze with desperate brilliance!
TECH-PRIEST: First restore power to the primary conduit.
CONGREGATION: Second purge the projection-lenses of corruption.
TECH-PRIEST: Third invoke the image-spirits—we must see the enemy!
CONGREGATION: Blessed be the light that reveals our salvation.

prompt: First use blessing for star chart alignment apparatus
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: A new oracle is born from the machine-womb. Attune it to the heavens!
CONGREGATION: Let the stellar-sensors drink in the light of distant suns.
TECH-PRIEST: The gyroscopic heart shall hold true against all drift.
CONGREGATION: The chart shall guide our vessels through the void eternal.
TECH-PRIEST: By the Omnissiah's geometry, let this device know the stars.
CONGREGATION: Let it know them perfectly and forever.

prompt: Maintenance ritual for relay station signal handoff
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The sacred signal passes from tower to tower. Speak the Litany of Transmission!
CONGREGATION: May the repeater-spirits hear and amplify without corruption.
TECH-PRIEST: First verify the signal-strength at the threshold of transfer.
CONGREGATION: Second let the receiver-arrays orient themselves true.
TECH-PRIEST: Thus the message flows onward, unbroken and pure.
CONGREGATION: The chain of command is preserved.

prompt: Emergency protocol for critical relay station signal handoff
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The relay dies! The signal fades! Engage the backup-conduits!
CONGREGATION: Reroute! Reroute! Let no message be lost!
TECH-PRIEST: First activate the secondary transmitter with all speed.
CONGREGATION: Second strengthen the carrier-wave against the void's hunger.
TECH-PRIEST: Third trust the Machine Spirit to bridge the gap.
CONGREGATION: The Omnissiah's will shall be delivered!
